mapper.select: SELECT vi.*, s.subject_code as subjectCode, s.subject_name as subjectName, CASE vi.direction WHEN '1' THEN '借' WHEN '2' THEN '贷' END as directionName FROM voucher_item vi LEFT JOIN account_subject s ON vi.subject_id = s.id WHERE vi.voucher_id = #{voucherId} ORDER BY vi.seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voucher_item (voucher_id, subject_id, direction, amount, summary, seq) VALUES (#{voucherId}, #{subjectId}, #{direction}, #{amount}, #{summary}, #{seq})
